hero.title: Join the Diyala River Foundation
hero.subtitle: Be part of a community that believes in sustainable change. Join us as an official member and help build a better future for Diyala.

types.title: Choose Membership Type
types.subtitle: Your membership type defines the nature of your participation in foundation activities

regular.title: Regular Member
regular.desc: For individuals who wish to participate in foundation activities and programs

founding.title: Founding Member
founding.desc: For those who believed in the mission from the start and contributed to the foundation's establishment

student.title: Student Member
student.desc: For university and institute students to participate in research projects

honorary.title: Honorary Member
honorary.desc: Granted to distinguished individuals with notable contributions in the foundation's areas of work

step4.title: Skills & Interests
step4.skillsPlaceholder: Type a skill and press Enter (e.g. design, coding, teaching)
step4.languagesPlaceholder: Type a language and press Enter (e.g. Arabic, English)

step5.title: Motivation & References
step5.motivationPlaceholder: Tell us why you want to join the foundation and what you hope to achieve...
step5.previousVolunteeringPlaceholder: Have you been involved in organizations or initiatives before? List them...
step5.howHeard: How did you hear about us?

step6.title: Agreement & Signature
step6.termsBody: By submitting this application, I confirm that the information provided is accurate and complete, and I agree to comply with the foundation's internal regulations and institutional values, actively participate in its activities, and not violate its principles.
step6.codeBody: I pledge to uphold professional and ethical conduct standards, respect diversity and difference, protect member and beneficiary data, and work in the interest of the foundation and its values.
step6.agreeTerms: I agree to the Terms and Conditions
step6.agreeCode: I agree to the Code of Conduct

validation.mustAgree: You must agree to this item to continue

success.title: Application Submitted Successfully!
success.subtitle: Your membership application has been received and will be reviewed by our team

steps.1: You will receive a confirmation email
steps.2: The team will review your application within 5-10 business days
steps.3: You will be notified of the decision by email and phone
